TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Ye-han.Kan-nay-di ÁīĄÁŅį¬∑ÁĒėŤŅļŤŅ™ == Ye-han.Fay-ce-cea-la-e-de.Kan-nay-di, caysiw caypic mihcaan lima a bulad tusiw a dimiad katukuh caysiw nemlu mihcaan caycay bulad tutu demiad, u ngangan nida ci Ye-han.F.Kan-nay-di "John F. Kennedy" ,JFK atu Cie-ke'.Kan-nay-di "Jack Kennedy", belihen nu cudad ci Kan-nay-di, saka lulim nu Amilika a Cuntun, u Amilika samilaliday nu lalabu nu lumaan a tademaw cini Kan-nay-di a tademawan, saka lihalay nu Amilika a dayhiw, ci nida u Amilika i likisian katukuh ayda sakasepat ni patayan nutaw a Cuntun. F¬∑ÁĒėŤŅļŤŅ™(John F. Kennedy),JFKśąĖŚāĎŚÖč¬∑ÁĒėŤŅļŤŅ™(Jack Kennedy), . sakatusa nu kalepacawan, mala Amilika nu sakakaay nu hitay ci nida, naytida i Nan-tay-ping-yang miala tu ma'lulay nu pabalungaay a hitay nu Amilika, sisa idaw ku kawlah nida tu Ce-sin payaan, sa mikawaw tu cence'. Caysiw sipnem mihcaan katukuh caysiw nemsep mihcaan mala Amilika nu Cun-yi-yen atu Cen-yi-yen masakaputay. caysiw nemsep mihcaan mala Cuntun, mala sayaway nu singkuan tu tinsukiw a Cuntun. sakakawawan nida pasu, len-pan-cun-pea-cun sakasumad nu kalecadan a saka caycaycaycaysep bangguan sincen patuduan, Culuowan kawawan, Kupafeidan kabalihenawan, Puolin langan a nipatideng, Taykun sakasetset, Yina kalepacawan atu caay kaw Amilika tademaw nipilaylayan. . kaadihan i labuay nu lumaan Śģ∂śóŹÁöĄÁôľŤ∑° baki ni Ye-han.Kan-nay-di ci Pay-cua-ke'. Kan-nay-di u Ay-e-lan-wi-ke'-se-hu-de niyaduay nu tademaw, caywal sipwal mihingan milaliw, mabulaw katuku i Amilika Ma-sa-cu-say-cuo a Puo-se-tun. baki ci Pay-cua-ke'.J.Kan-nay-di itida i Pu-se-tun misiwbay tu kakalipahan, misiwbay tu ngiku, milabu tu tidaay a cence nu kawawan, namala Ma-sa-cu-say-cuo a giingngan. J . wama ci Law-ye-se'. P.Kan-nay-di i caywal walwal mihcaan lecuhan i Pu-se-tun, caysiw caytu mihcaan i Ha-fuo ta'sye mihedek micudad, nu gingku ku kawaw nida. caysiw caysip mihcaan itida i Pu-se-tun Ke-lun-pi-ya gingku mala cuncinli. sakacacay nikalepacawan tu kitakidan itida i Pu-min-han misangaay tu balunga a kusian mala fucuncili. hedek sa malepacaw u babalai nida ci Kan-nay-di misalama tu kupiaw yadah ku'tan, mala siidaay nu tademaw, nikudan tayda i Haw-lay-wu misiwbay tu kakacuduan. caysiw lusep mihcaan taluma' i Pu-se-tun. caysiw lutu mihcaan misinkiw tu cuntun nu Amilika tawya, patideng ci nida ci Hu-lan-ke'-lin.De-la-nuo. Luo-se-fu. caysiw sipsep mihcaan caycay a bulad, babalaki a Kan-nay-di yadah ku cinglaw ci nidaan ales han tu nida ku tase a kawawan. Áą∂Ť¶™ŤÄĀÁīĄÁĎü¬∑P . yu mahida nika udipśó©ŚĻīÁĒüśīĽ caysiw caypic mihcaan lima a bulad tusiw dimiad, lecuhan ci Kan-nay-di, babalaki nida i caysiw caysip mihcaan cacay a bataan nu demiad mikikung, sasiwa ku wawa nu heni, sasepat ku tatami lalima ku tatayna, saka tusa ci Ye-han.Kan-nay-di. 1917ŚĻī5śúą29śó•, . ci Ye-han.Kan-nay-di limaay ku mihcaan nida micumud tu Fuo-luo-li-ta-lu-fen-lai-de cacudadn minanam, tuluay a mihcaan, itida ci nida minanam tu mulaay a cacudadan katukuh tu nu wawaan a nipinanam tu tuluay a cudadan. pituay ku mihcaan ni Kan-nay-di atu siwaay a kakaan ci Siw-ye-se.P. Kan-nay-di patayda i cacudadan minanam. caysiw lulim mihcaan nu sadingsing, miyukiw ci nida micumud minanam i Pu-lin-se-tun tasye a cudadan, nika kaiyan nu cacudadan. nikudan, saicelang sa ci ama nida, tu sabaw cacay a buladan micumud minanam. tada imelan tu ci nida, katukuh sa ci nida tu sabaw tusa a bulad minanam. caysiw lunem mihcaan pitu a bulad, micumud ci Kan-nay-di tu Ha-fuo tasye minanam sa maala. P . caysiw sipsep mihcaan siwa a bulad, ci Ye-han. Kan-nay-di tayda i Se-dan-fuo tasye sangsyeyun minanam. sakay i Cia-li-hu-ni-ya-cuo mikapah tu udip. nipinanam nida tu kakinkiwan a cudadan tatenga u sangwu atu Kuoci-cinzun, nika manamuh ci nida tu cencesye atu kuocikunsi. sakakapah tu udip mutikuaca tu caysiw sipcay mihcaan taluma' tu Amilika nu walian, kainai'an nu lawad mikilim tu mamisulit tu dadatengan nu wama . ci Ye-han. Kan-nay-di namisimsim tu sapisingsi tu sapicumud i Ye-lu tasye fasyeyen minanam, nika sadikuday pacabay ci nida tu lumaay a tademaw tayda i Na-mei-cuo midang ales hantu nida, taydan nu heni i A-ken-ting, Pa-si, Ce'-li' taydan i U-la-kuy, Mi-lu, E'-kua-duo, Ke-lun-pi-ya atu Pa-na-ma apuyu ku nipahanhan nuheni i tida. 1940ŚĻī9śúą, .

bur~…ĺad tutu d…ômiad, u ŇčaŇčan nida ¶i j…ô-ńßan.f.kan-naj-di "*ońßn f. k…ônn…ôdj" ,*fk atu ¶i…ô-k…ô Ē~ °.kan-naj-di "*a ¶k k…ônn…ôdj", b…ôr~…ĺińß…ôn nu ¶udad ¶i kan-naj-di, saka r~…ĺur~…ĺim nu amir~…ĺika a ¶untun, u amir~…ĺika samir~…ĺar~…ĺidaj nu r~…ĺar~…ĺabu nu r~…ĺumaan a tad…ômaw ¶ini kan-naj-di a tad…ômawan, saka r~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj nu amir~…ĺika a dajńßiw, ¶i nida u amir~…ĺika i r~…ĺikisian katukuńß ajda sakas…ôpat ni patajan nutaw a ¶untun. f****(*ońßn f. k…ônn…ôdj),*fk*******(*a ¶k k…ônn…ôdj), . sakatusa nu kar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan, mar~…ĺa amir~…ĺika nu sakakaaj nu ńßitaj ¶i nida, ¶aan katukuńß ¶ajsiw n…ôms…ôp mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺa amir~…ĺika nu ¶un-ji-j…ôn atu ¶…ôn-ji-j…ôn masakaputaj. ¶ajsiw n…ôms…ôp mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺa ¶untun, mar~…ĺa sajawaj nu siŇčkuan tu tinsukiw a ¶untun. sakakawawan nida pasu, r~…ĺ…ôn-pan- ¶un-p…ôa- ¶un sakasumad nu kar~…ĺ…ô ¶adan a saka ¶aj ¶aj ¶aj ¶ajs…ôp baŇčguan sin ¶…ôn patuduan, ¶ur~…ĺuowan kawawan, kupaf…ôidan kabar~…ĺińß…ônawan, puor~…ĺin ¶ua-k…ô Ē~ °. kan-naj-di u aj-…ô-r~…ĺan-wi-k…ô Ē~ °-s…ô-ńßu-d…ô nijaduaj nu tad…ômaw, ¶ajwar~…ĺ sipwar~…ĺ mińßiŇčan mir~…ĺar~…ĺiw, mabur~…ĺaw katuku i amir~…ĺika ma-sa- ¶u-saj- ¶uo a puo-s…ô-tun. baki ¶ajsip mińß ¶aan itida i pu-s…ô-tun k…ô-r~…ĺun-pi-ja giŇčku mar~…ĺa ¶un ¶inr~…ĺi. saka ¶a ¶aj nikar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan tu kitakidan itida i pu-min-ńßan misaŇčaaj tu bar~…ĺuŇča a kusian mar~…ĺa fu ¶un ¶ir~…ĺi. ńß…ôd…ôk sa mar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw u babar~…ĺai nida ¶i kan-naj-di misar~…ĺama tu kupiaw jadańß ku Ē~ °tan, mar~…ĺa siidaaj nu tad…ômaw, nikudan tajda i ńßaw-r~…ĺaj-wu misiwbaj tu kaka ¶uduan. ¶ajsiw r~…ĺus…ôp mińß ¶aan tar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° i pu-s…ô-tun. ¶ajsiw r~…ĺutu mińß ¶aan misinkiw tu ¶untun nu amir~…ĺika tawja, patid…ôŇč ¶i nida ¶i ńßu-r~…ĺan-k…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺin.d…ô-r~…ĺa-nuo. r~…ĺuo-s…ô-fu. ¶ajsiw r~…ĺima a bur~…ĺad tusiw dimiad, r~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan ¶i kan-naj-di, babar~…ĺaki nida i ¶ajsiw ¶ajsip mińß ¶aan ¶a ¶aj a bataan nu d…ômiad mikikuŇč, sasiwa ku wawa nu ńß…ôni, sas…ôpat ku tatami r~…ĺar~…ĺima ku tatajna, saka tusa ¶i j…ô-ńßan.kan-naj-di. **********, . ¶i j…ô-ńßan.kan-naj-di r~…ĺimaaj ku mińß ¶aan nida mi ¶umud tu fuo-r~…ĺuo-r~…ĺi-ta-r~…ĺu-f…ôn-r~…ĺai-d…ô ¶a ¶udadn minanam, tur~…ĺuaj a mińß ¶i ama nida, tu sabaw ¶a ¶aj a bur~…ĺadan mi ¶umud minanam. tada im…ôr~…ĺan tu ¶i nida, katukuńß sa ¶i nida tu sabaw tusa a bur~…ĺad minanam. ¶ajsiw r~…ĺun…ôm mińß ¶aan pitu a bur~…ĺad, mi ¶umud ¶i S.FORM: == Ye-han.Kan-nay-di ÁīĄÁŅį¬∑ÁĒėŤŅļŤŅ™ == Ye-han.Fay-ce-cea-la-e-de.Kan-nay-di, caysiw caypic mihcaan lima a bulad tusiw a dimiad katukuh caysiw nemlu mihcaan caycay bulad tutu demiad, u ngangan nida ci Ye-han.F.Kan-nay-di "John F. Kennedy" ,JFK atu Cie-ke'.Kan-nay-di "Jack Kennedy", belihen nu cudad ci Kan-nay-di, saka lulim nu Amilika a Cuntun, u Amilika samilaliday nu lalabu nu lumaan a tademaw cini Kan-nay-di a tademawan, saka lihalay nu Amilika a dayhiw, ci nida u Amilika i likisian katukuh ayda sakasepat ni patayan nutaw a Cuntun. F¬∑ÁĒėŤŅļŤŅ™(John F. Kennedy),JFKśąĖŚāĎŚÖč¬∑ÁĒėŤŅļŤŅ™(Jack Kennedy), . sakatusa nu kalepacawan, mala Amilika nu sakakaay nu hitay ci nida, naytida i Nan-tay-ping-yang miala tu ma'lulay nu pabalungaay a hitay nu Amilika, sisa idaw ku kawlah nida tu Ce-sin payaan, sa mikawaw tu cence'. Caysiw sipnem mihcaan katukuh caysiw nemsep mihcaan mala Amilika nu Cun-yi-yen atu Cen-yi-yen masakaputay. caysiw nemsep mihcaan mala Cuntun, mala sayaway nu singkuan tu tinsukiw a Cuntun. sakakawawan nida pasu, len-pan-cun-pea-cun sakasumad nu kalecadan a saka caycaycaycaysep bangguan sincen patuduan, Culuowan kawawan, Kupafeidan kabalihenawan, Puolin langan a nipatideng, Taykun sakasetset, Yina kalepacawan atu caay kaw Amilika tademaw nipilaylayan. . kaadihan i labuay nu lumaan Śģ∂śóŹÁöĄÁôľŤ∑° baki ni Ye-han.Kan-nay-di ci Pay-cua-ke'. Kan-nay-di u Ay-e-lan-wi-ke'-se-hu-de niyaduay nu tademaw, caywal sipwal mihingan milaliw, mabulaw katuku i Amilika Ma-sa-cu-say-cuo a Puo-se-tun. baki ci Pay-cua-ke'.J.Kan-nay-di itida i Pu-se-tun misiwbay tu kakalipahan, misiwbay tu ngiku, milabu tu tidaay a cence nu kawawan, namala Ma-sa-cu-say-cuo a giingngan. J . wama ci Law-ye-se'. P.Kan-nay-di i caywal walwal mihcaan lecuhan i Pu-se-tun, caysiw caytu mihcaan i Ha-fuo ta'sye mihedek micudad, nu gingku ku kawaw nida. caysiw caysip mihcaan itida i Pu-se-tun Ke-lun-pi-ya gingku mala cuncinli. sakacacay nikalepacawan tu kitakidan itida i Pu-min-han misangaay tu balunga a kusian mala fucuncili. hedek sa malepacaw u babalai nida ci Kan-nay-di misalama tu kupiaw yadah ku'tan, mala siidaay nu tademaw, nikudan tayda i Haw-lay-wu misiwbay tu kakacuduan. caysiw lusep mihcaan taluma' i Pu-se-tun. caysiw lutu mihcaan misinkiw tu cuntun nu Amilika tawya, patideng ci nida ci Hu-lan-ke'-lin.De-la-nuo. Luo-se-fu. caysiw sipsep mihcaan caycay a bulad, babalaki a Kan-nay-di yadah ku cinglaw ci nidaan ales han tu nida ku tase a kawawan. Áą∂Ť¶™ŤÄĀÁīĄÁĎü¬∑P . yu mahida nika udipśó©ŚĻīÁĒüśīĽ caysiw caypic mihcaan lima a bulad tusiw dimiad, lecuhan ci Kan-nay-di, babalaki nida i caysiw caysip mihcaan cacay a bataan nu demiad mikikung, sasiwa ku wawa nu heni, sasepat ku tatami lalima ku tatayna, saka tusa ci Ye-han.Kan-nay-di. 1917ŚĻī5śúą29śó•, . ci Ye-han.Kan-nay-di limaay ku mihcaan nida micumud tu Fuo-luo-li-ta-lu-fen-lai-de cacudadn minanam, tuluay a mihcaan, itida ci nida minanam tu mulaay a cacudadan katukuh tu nu wawaan a nipinanam tu tuluay a cudadan. pituay ku mihcaan ni Kan-nay-di atu siwaay a kakaan ci Siw-ye-se.P. Kan-nay-di patayda i cacudadan minanam. caysiw lulim mihcaan nu sadingsing, miyukiw ci nida micumud minanam i Pu-lin-se-tun tasye a cudadan, nika kaiyan nu cacudadan. nikudan, saicelang sa ci ama nida, tu sabaw cacay a buladan micumud minanam. tada imelan tu ci nida, katukuh sa ci nida tu sabaw tusa a bulad minanam. caysiw lunem mihcaan pitu a bulad, micumud ci Kan-nay-di tu Ha-fuo tasye minanam sa maala. P . caysiw sipsep mihcaan siwa a bulad, ci Ye-han. Kan-nay-di tayda i Se-dan-fuo tasye sangsyeyun minanam. sakay i Cia-li-hu-ni-ya-cuo mikapah tu udip. nipinanam nida tu kakinkiwan a cudadan tatenga u sangwu atu Kuoci-cinzun, nika manamuh ci nida tu cencesye atu kuocikunsi. sakakapah tu udip mutikuaca tu caysiw sipcay mihcaan taluma' tu Amilika nu walian, kainai'an nu lawad mikilim tu mamisulit tu dadatengan nu wama . ci Ye-han. Kan-nay-di namisimsim tu sapisingsi tu sapicumud i Ye-lu tasye fasyeyen minanam, nika sadikuday pacabay ci nida tu lumaay a tademaw tayda i Na-mei-cuo midang ales hantu nida, taydan nu heni i A-ken-ting, Pa-si, Ce'-li' taydan i U-la-kuy, Mi-lu, E'-kua-duo, Ke-lun-pi-ya atu Pa-na-ma apuyu ku nipahanhan nuheni i tida. 1940ŚĻī9śúą, .

¶aan katukuńß ¶ajsiw n…ôms…ôp mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺa amir~…ĺika nu ¶un-ji-j…ôn atu ¶…ôn-ji-j…ôn masakaputaj. ¶ajsiw n…ôms…ôp mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺa ¶untun, mar~…ĺa sajawaj nu siŇčkuan tu tinsukiw a ¶untun. sakakawawan nida pasu, r~…ĺ…ôn-pan- ¶un-p…ôa- ¶un sakasumad nu kar~…ĺ…ô ¶adan a saka ¶aj ¶aj ¶aj ¶ajs…ôp baŇčguan sin ¶…ôn patuduan, ¶ur~…ĺuowan kawawan, kupaf…ôidan kabar~…ĺińß…ônawan, puor~…ĺin r~…ĺaw-j…ô-s…ô Ē~ °. p.kan-naj-di i ¶ajwar~…ĺ war~…ĺwar~…ĺ mińß ¶aan r~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan i pu-s…ô-tun, ¶ajsiw ¶ajtu mińß ¶aan i ńßa-fuo ta Ē~ °sj…ô mińß…ôd…ôk mi ¶udad, nu giŇčku ku kawaw nida. ¶ajsiw ¶ajsip mińß ¶aan itida i pu-s…ô-tun k…ô-r~…ĺun-pi-ja giŇčku mar~…ĺa ¶un ¶inr~…ĺi. saka ¶a ¶aj nikar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan tu kitakidan itida i pu-min-ńßan misaŇčaaj tu bar~…ĺuŇča a kusian mar~…ĺa fu ¶un ¶ir~…ĺi. ńß…ôd…ôk sa mar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw u babar~…ĺai nida ¶i kan-naj-di misar~…ĺama tu kupiaw jadańß ku Ē~ °tan, mar~…ĺa siidaaj nu tad…ômaw, nikudan tajda i ńßaw-r~…ĺaj-wu misiwbaj tu kaka ¶uduan. ¶ajsiw sips…ôp mińß ¶aan ¶aj ¶aj a bur~…ĺad, babar~…ĺaki a kan-naj-di jadańß ku ¶iŇčr~…ĺaw ¶i nidaan ar~…ĺ…ôs ńßan tu nida ku tas…ô a kawawan. ******p . ju mańßida nika udip**** ¶ajsiw ¶ajpi ¶ mińß ¶aan r~…ĺima a bur~…ĺad tusiw dimiad, r~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan ¶i kan-naj-di, babar~…ĺaki nida i ¶ajsiw ¶ajsip mińß ¶aan ¶a ¶aj a bataan nu d…ômiad mikikuŇč, sasiwa ku wawa nu ńß…ôni, sas…ôpat ku tatami r~…ĺar~…ĺima ku tatajna, saka tusa ¶i j…ô-ńßan.kan-naj-di. **********, . ¶i j…ô-ńßan.kan-naj-di r~…ĺimaaj ku mińß ¶aan nida mi ¶umud tu fuo-r~…ĺuo-r~…ĺi-ta-r~…ĺu-f…ôn-r~…ĺai-d…ô ¶a ¶udadn minanam, tur~…ĺuaj a mińß ¶aan, itida ¶i nida minanam tu mur~…ĺaaj a ¶a ¶udadan katukuńß tu nu wawaan a nipinanam tu tur~…ĺuaj a ¶udadan. pituaj ku mińß ¶aan ni kan-naj-di atu siwaaj a kakaan ¶i siw-j…ô-s…ô.p. kan-naj-di patajda i ¶a ¶udadan minanam. ¶ajsiw r~…ĺur~…ĺim mińß ¶aan nu sadiŇčsiŇč, mijukiw ¶i nida mi ¶umud minanam i pu-r~…ĺin-s…ô-tun tasj…ô a ¶udadan, nika kaijan nu ¶a ¶udadan. nikudan, sai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč sa ¶i ama nida, tu sabaw ¶a ¶aj a bur~…ĺadan mi ¶umud minanam. tada im…ôr~…ĺan tu ¶i nida, katukuńß sa ¶i nida tu sabaw tusa a bur~…ĺad minanam. ¶ajsiw r~…ĺun…ôm mińß ¶aan pitu a bur~…ĺad, mi ¶umud ¶i kan-naj-di tu ńßa-fuo tasj…ô minanam sa maar~…ĺa. p . ¶ajsiw sips…ôp mińß ¶aan siwa a bur~…ĺad, ¶i j…ô-ńßan. kan-naj-di tajda i s…ô-dan-fuo tasj…ô saŇčsj…ôun minanam. sakaj i ¶ia-r~…ĺi-ńßu-ni-ja- ¶uo mikapańß tu udip. nipinanam nida tu kakinkiwan a ¶udadan tat…ôŇča u saŇčwu atu kuo ¶i- ¶inzun, nika manamuńß ¶i nida tu ¶…ôn ¶…ôsj…ô atu kuo ¶ikunsi. sakakapańß tu udip mutikua ¶a tu ¶ajsiw sip ¶aj mińß ¶aan tar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° tu amir~…ĺika nu war~…ĺian, kainai Ē~ °an nu r~…ĺawad mikir~…ĺim tu mamisur~…ĺit tu dadat…ôŇčan nu wama . ¶i j…ô-ńßan. kan-naj-di namisimsim tu sapisiŇčsi tu sapi ¶umud i j…ô-r~…ĺu tasj…ô fasj…ô…ôn minanam, nika sadikudaj pa ¶abaj ¶i nida tu r~…ĺumaaj a tad…ômaw tajda i na-m…ôi- ¶uo midaŇč ar~…ĺ…ôs ńßantu nida, tajdan nu ńß…ôni i a-k…ôn-tiŇč, pa-si, ¶…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺi Ē~ ° tajdan i u-r~…ĺa-kuj, mi-r~…ĺu, …ô Ē~ °-kua-duo, k…ô-r~…ĺun-pi-ja atu pa-na-ma apuju ku nipańßanńßan nuńß…ôni i tida. *******, .
